hero.description: Bridging the gap between scalable software engineering and robust IT infrastructure.

about.title: About
about.p1: Highly adaptable IT professional and development leader with over 8 years of enterprise experience bridging software engineering and IT infrastructure. Currently serving as Head of Application Development, specializing in Full-Stack Web Development (<accent1>Next.js, ASP.NET Core</accent1>) and DevOps methodologies.
about.p2: Proven track record of architecting scalable applications, orchestrating automated deployments to high-availability web servers (<accent2>IIS, Nginx</accent2>), and managing CI/CD pipelines in Azure DevOps.
about.p3: Brings deep foundational expertise in optimizing enterprise virtualization, deploying Windows Server and Linux environments across VMs and bare-metal servers, and AI Deep Learning research.

job1.title: Head of Application Development Service
job1.desc1: Architected and deployed scalable full-stack web solutions (Next.js, ASP.NET Core).
job1.desc2: Managed Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines for automated deployments to IIS and Nginx.
job1.desc3: Led engineering teams in end-to-end design and delivery of robust internal solutions.

job2.title: System Engineer
job2.desc1: Deployed and administered Windows Server/Linux on VMs and bare-metal servers.
job2.desc3: Administered Active Directory and enterprise backup solutions (Veeam).

job3.title: Micro-Enterprise Owner & IT Consultant
job3.desc1: Architected end-to-end infrastructure with Proxmox VE and complete domain deployments.
job3.desc2: Developed custom Web, Mobile, and Desktop applications for corporate clients.

project1.title: Enterprise Payroll & Career System
project1.description: Digitized and streamlined payroll processes replacing legacy systems with a modern automated solution.

project2.title: Corporate Web Portal
project2.description: Engineered a highly scalable public-facing corporate portal with integrated mobile functionality.

project3.title: AI Human Action Recognition
project3.description: PhD research application utilizing a fusion of audio and skeleton data for real-time human action recognition.

degrees.phd: PhD Student in Computer Science (Deep Learning)
degrees.masters: Master's Degree in Embedded Systems and Mobility
